lines.text: New here? Have a seat, don't be nervous. I'm the... temporary head of this Interstellar Assignment Bureau.
Do you know the Galaxy Human Resources Department?
Great. Simply put, recently a group of alien 'job seekers' have flooded in. They've grown tired of their own planets and want to work in a different place.
It doesn't matter if you don't know. Anyway, they only send emails.
In short, recently there has been a wave of alien "job seekers" pouring in. They've grown tired of staying on their own planets and want to work in a different place.
But the problem is, some of those extraterrestrial beings have good temperaments, some have an IQ comparable to a rock, and some...
Our job is to test them and then assign them to the appropriate planets.
If everything is correct, you'll also receive a wonderful surprise gift from headquarters!
Next, your senior colleague Wang Jiang will guide you in learning basic assignment knowledge.
All in all, work hard, young man. Ciao~!
Oh, it seems you've completed your first day of work~
Let me take a look at your completion report.
n super satisfied, n average, n complaints and negative reviews!
It seems you still have something to learn~
Oh my god! Do you think with your toes?!

1.name: Sprigara
1.description: A lush world where vegetation grows with unsettling intelligence, watching every step you take.

2.name: Tonis
2.description: A bustling industrial planet powered by ambition, where every deal hides a deeper cost.

3.name: Shawshank
3.description: A water-dominated planet, with over 80% of its surface covered by ocean. Its only landmass hosts the most heavily guarded prison in the galaxy.

4.name: Helix-9
4.description: A mechanized world of endless gears and spirals, where nothing ever truly stops moving.

5.name: Erakos
5.description: A harsh desert planet ruled by ancient forces buried beneath the sands.

6.name: Edenfall
6.description: A once-perfect paradise, now fractured by a forgotten catastrophe.

7.name: Gelora
7.description: A gelatinous world where terrain shifts like liquid, swallowing anything that stands still.

8.name: Vermilion Eye
8.description: A crimson planet with a massive eye-like storm that never closes.

9.name: Surukan
9.description: A mist-covered world inhabited by elusive, possibly sentient echoes of the past.

10.name: Talassus
10.description: A deep-ocean planet where entire civilizations thrive beneath crushing pressure.
